target_audience: Individuals and small businesses managing personal and business finances, primarily Swedish/Nordic users
emotional_tone: Authoritative, Precise, Futuristic, Elite Financial Control
visual_mood: The Technical Look - High-contrast dark mode with grid borders, neon cyan accents, and terminal-like precision.

headings.description: Used for all headings to provide an authoritative, slightly brutalist geometric look perfect for elite fintech. Never use Inter for headings.

body.description: Used strictly for body text, descriptions, and tabular data for high legibility.

rules: Headings must use Chivo with tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
ALL financial metrics, currencies, and numbers MUST use the 'tabular-nums' class to prevent jitter in tables and charts.
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, and widely spaced.
Background primary (#0A0A0A) must be used for the main application canvas.
Background secondary (#1A1A1A) must be used for cards, sidebars, and dropdowns.
Background tertiary (#2A2A2A) must be used for subtle borders, dividers, and default hover states.
Never use pure black (#000000) or generic Tailwind grays without tinting. Stick strictly to the provided hex codes.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for overlays, headers, or dropdowns. They must be solid #1A1A1A with a #2A2A2A border.

cards.interactive: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:border-[#4FC3C3]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(79,195,195,0.1)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#4FC3C3] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold rounded-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#3AA8A8] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(79,195,195,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(79,195,195,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] hover:border-[#4FC3C3]/30
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#A3A3A3] rounded-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] hover:text-white

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4FC3C3] focus:border-[#4FC3C3] transition-all duration-200 placeholder:text-[#A3A3A3]/50

rules: Use sharp or barely-rounded corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none) to emphasize precision. NO large border-radii.
Use 'Grid Borders' style: Expose the skeleton. Dashboards should feel like a command center.
Never use muddy gray drop shadows in dark mode. Use colored light bleeds (cyan/teal glow) or solid 1px borders.

structure.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[280px] bg-[#1A1A1A] border-r border-[#2A2A2A] z-40
structure.header: fixed top-0 right-0 left-[280px] h-[80px] bg-[#1A1A1A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#2A2A2A] z-30

spacing: Use generous spacing: p-6 or p-8 inside cards.
Maintain a 24px (gap-6) baseline for grid gaps.
Ensure dense but optically aligned content for tabular data.
rules: Items inside the grid must stretch to fill height: use h-full and flex column.
Never center-align the app container. Dashboards must be full width.
Sidebar is fixed 280px on desktop. On mobile, it should be a hidden drawer accessible via hamburger menu.
Never use 'transition: all' globally. Apply transitions to specific interactives.
Hovering over table rows MUST highlight the row: hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] or hover:bg-[#4FC3C3]/5.
Active navigation links in sidebar should have a left border: border-l-2 border-[#4FC3C3] bg-[#4FC3C3]/10 text-white.

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle SVG noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) over the #0A0A0A background to remove the 'digital flatness' and give it a matte terminal feel.
visual_enhancers.charts: Use Recharts. Tooltips MUST have bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#2A2A2A]. Lines/Bars must use #4FC3C3, #10B981, and #EF4444.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Weight: 'duotone' for active nav items, 'regular' for standard UI).
visual_enhancers.loaders: Use a minimal #4FC3C3 spinning border or glowing pulse. No heavy generic spinners.

shadcn_customizations: Button: Override radii to rounded-sm. Update primary colors to #4FC3C3.
Table: Left-aligned, tabular-nums for data cells, border-b-[#2A2A2A].
Tabs: Solid background, sharp borders, active tab has #4FC3C3 text.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='transaction-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must exceed 4.5:1 ratio. #A3A3A3 on #0A0A0A is 6.5:1 (Pass). #FFFFFF on #0A0A0A is 21:1 (Pass).
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4FC3C3]/50.

images.description: Abstract neon cyan lines on dark background. Use for the right/left split pane of the Login/Register screen.
Professional grayscale avatar for the Settings/Profile dropdown in the header.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: DO NOT use generic centered layouts or simplistic uniform styling. Embrace asymmetry and strict grid alignment.
DO NOT use emojis as icons. Ever. Use Phosphor Icons.
Ensure the sidebar is exactly 280px wide and fixed. The main content must be offset by pl-[280px] and pt-[80px].
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications. Place the Toaster component in the main App wrapper.
For the bilingual switcher (SV/EN), implement it in the top header as a sharp toggle or Shadcn Select.
Debt payoff calculator and Budget rings MUST use Recharts for visualization.
Always apply 'tabular-nums' to tables, charts, and metric cards displaying SEK, USD, or percentages.
Component exports MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
All file paths in instructions must assume standard React CRA/Vite structure inside /app/frontend/src.
